Title: The Artful Dodger
Writer: David Maher, James McNamara, David Taylor
Actors: Thomas Brodie-Sangster, David Thewlis, Maia Mitchell
Plot: In 1850s Australia, the past of Jack Dawkins, a former pickpocket who has become a surgeon, resurfaces when an old acquaintance, Fagin, arrives and lures him back into a life of crime.
